title: Drone-Willow-Bumblebee
text:
This Benjamin is the best benjamin, ben can do so much. He can fly drone, he can jump. Jeez, he can do whatever. Even take you picture.













This drone is the coolest drone, it can do so much. It can fly, It can land, It can jump. Jeez, it can do whatever you want. Even take your picture.













This glacier is the coolest glacier, it can do so much. It can slide, It can shrink, It can weep. It can do whatever you want. Even make you cold.
